<!--
Thanks for contributing to VeriLearn. Keep the description tight and
factual — say what changed and how you know it works.
-->

## What & why

<!-- What does this change do, and what problem/story does it address?
     Reference the user-story ID(s) if applicable (e.g. TEST-11, TRUST-06). -->

## How it was verified

<!-- Not just "tests pass" — say what you actually exercised. E.g.
     "quarantined a claim via /admin/quarantine and confirmed the task
     grader refused it." Note new/changed tests. -->

- [ ] `npm run lint` clean
- [ ] `npm test` passing
- [ ] `npm run build` green
- [ ] Exercised the affected flow (not just the test suite)

## Notes for the reviewer

<!-- Anything non-obvious: a deliberate trade-off, a follow-up left out
     of scope, a disposition doc updated, etc. Delete if none. -->
